name: har-record
description: 使用浏览器自动化录制 HAR 文件

scripts.clean:logs: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join(process.cwd(),'logs');if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f=>fs.unlinkSync(path.join(dir,f)));console.log('日志已清理');}else{console.log('日志目录不存在');}"
